summary: A mood-based app where users select how they are feeling. Removing the activity options (music, dance, stories, self care, meditation, what to watch, journaling) that appear after the user selects their mood.

existing_features.title: In ConversationInput.tsx, remove the tabbed panel of mood-based resources that appears after the user submits their mood/feeling. This includes removing the tabs and their content for: Music, Dance, Stories, Self Care, Meditation, What to Watch, and Journaling. The input form for submitting emotional check-ins should remain intact.
